reviews.review_description: This game was way better than expected. Glad I read the reviews and gave it a try. So many classic callbacks to games while playing. Streets of Rage, Sonic, Mortal Kombat come directly to mind. Was a great experience playing a game inside of a game disguised as another game.

If you have nostalgia for this time period, this game is a must play. Its charm is undeniable, and the gameplay is varied. 

Only con is that it is a short game. At times, I did find myself wishing I had a D-pad, but that is a limitation of the Quest.
The game is so cool I love it but it’s difficult but worth it❤️

Immersive gameplay, great plot, hilarious gags, 16-bit and early 3d game nostalgia pours into your eyes 🤩 it's a time machine to those good'ol super Nintendo and Sega Genesis times (the game literally takes you to your 90s childhood). But you're not just an ordinary kid, you're on a mission to save the friggin world from the evil goblin that escaped from your cartridge, so simple yet it sucks you in like a "Reply All" email thread about someone’s missing tuna sandwich in the office fridge.

reviews.review_title: Looked cute, gave it a try
reviews.review_description:
Could use a more thorough tutorial for those of us who never actually played the old style games. The premise is interesting, game within a game setup, but I’m stumped how to effectively move the char and the “ press B” instruction leaves out the other actions you need to do in order to make the pixel character jump, shoot, move around obstacles properly. 
Platforming, side scrolling, whatever, when arcades were popular in the 80’i played devious and space invaders. Oh well.

Its just peak!  I suggest  you to get it to try it ,
variety  of game styles and the story  its just sooooo good!

reviews.review_title: Best VR game I've played yet
reviews.review_description: Creative, nostalgic, with a passion for the craft

This game will constantly surprise you with how clever it is; it’s a game within a game.  Tons of callbacks to the popular games on the Super Nintendo, Genesis, 32X, and early PlayStation games.  The only complaint is that it’s short but there’s replay value finding all the secrets in each chapter.

If I said anymore it would spoil the experience.  Go play it!

I started this game with low expectations, but it completely blew me away. The unique gameplay is incredible, the controls are smooth, and it’s genuinely fun from start to finish. I was surprised by the great storyline and how polished it feels. If you’re doubtful about VR games, this one will totally change your mind.
If you have joystick drift then this game isn't for you

This is the most immersive and nostalgic game I've ever played. The gameplay is so satisfying, crossing through so many gaming styles from the '80s through the mid '90s and through typical childhood experiences that felt like I was thrown back in time. I need more. Like a Pixel Ripped 1999 or 2001 maybe. :)
The only people that should play this one are people that truly love retro games, probably even better if you played them as a kid. I'm too young to feel any connection to old school games like this.
Bursts of fun!
...cares
Well made nostalgiafest. Impressively engaging and played it through like a good book over christmas! Great!

I will be looking for all of the games in this series. It is plain incredible and I really really enjoyed every second of it. Great animation, and the dialogue is great, an makes you really immersed. It’s a great game. 💯 recommend.

I didn't think I would like it very much but I beat the whole thing and will probably go back to get the golden cartridges.  Everything about it is great, the games in the games are fun, especially the video store levels.

I had low expectations for this game and was not exactly sure what to expect by watching the preview and the screenshot. This game actually surprised me and I enjoyed it quite a bit. Some nostalgia for sure. Reminded me how it was playing games in the 90's into early 2000. I feel like the story could have been somehow better so that takes away 1 star.
I bought the game because it looked good  but I played it i can't get past level 2 but it has more chances

This game effectively explore the tropes of video gaming as a kid, literally putting you back in your childhood living room playing oldschool games with you parents in the background being goofs. The interactive element where the games become part of your environment is so beyond creative I’m flawed.
I don’t usually play single player games but this game hooked me

Really cool game, mixing in the old style of being in the 90s playing old games but then mixing the VR style with the style of games back then into the room was cool, makes it feel like that’s what you imagined it to be like when you play them games back then.

Would absolutely recommend to give it a chance, I hate pixel games but this was genuinely really good fun to play.
Some of the ability is hard to use and the jumps are really horrible to actually to the point where it’s no longer immersive
i really do not like level six i love the game i really hate it it's really really hard please change level six
I had an absolute blast playing this game the graphics the immersion and the gameplay are all a 10/10

This was a walk down memory lane. The game starts a little slow but soon the surprises rack up. Most of the time I found myself just smiling and enjoying the game. Sure did give me euphoria!
I hope they are working on more pixel ripped games in this style or a little later.

I played the whole game today and it was amazing. I cannot put into words how life changing-ly good this game was. My only complaint it that it was not long enough as I would have loved to see a mini post game where you could walk around the village and see all the different game character.
This is the first game I've played that literally pulled me into my childhood and I love it.
one of the level is bs
Game is fun, good ideas and good story but the story is only a few hours and there is nothing to do after that I would not pay $20.00 for just a few hours.

reviews.review_title: Nearly crashed out on my mom
reviews.review_description: Shes ANNOYING
Why make the skeletons be able to throw THROUGH walls and floors. I’m shooting PLASMA BALLS and I can’t shoot thru stuff but a skeleton with a cleaver can. Uninstalled never gonna finish that

Its like so fun you can play a cool retro game and try to beat it but it’s like your a kid from the 90s which makes the game so cool and you try not to get caught my the mom and the levels are so fun   And it’s very nostalgic this games gets 5 stars!!!

reviews.review_title: It was OK story was kind of shallow
reviews.review_description: Cool concept bad writing, the levels were bland and uninteresting and the game felt like I was being rushed. Full game is probably about 3 hours long and has no real replay value.
This Game is the most fun i've has on the meta quest. Nice mechanics, great humor and a huge level of respect for the older games that inspired this title. Big thanks to the Devs for this experience.
Fun dont get if you suck at platformers

At first, I thought this was a bootleg game not worth playing.
However, with Meta Horizon +, I gave this game a try, and although it is a bootleg game, it's a 90s nostalgia simulator, and with a story like Toy Story combined. 

It's short and not that long, but it's highly worth a try. I wouldn't recommend getting it at full price, though. Try it with Meta Horizon +

reviews.review_title: Could not get past the first 30 minutes
reviews.review_description: The constant talking of the mother and the kid in the window while trying to read and understand the storyline. I couldn’t take the non stop nagging from the mom

Thank you Devs for the game, it's an awesome idea! Really appeals to the younger me! I just love everything about the game. I already know I'm gona get all the dlc content and I've not even finished the first level yet.
Anyone that loved the arcade in the 80s/90s this is a must have.

Only one thing I would ask for is multiple save slots

reviews.review_title: one of the best games i've ever played
reviews.review_description: i literally couldn't stop talking about this game for a long time and i'm not even joking it was just so unique and i had so much fun i finished the whole game in 2 days because i was grinding
This game is really fun and creative. I thought it was cool how we switch between Dot and David and everything. All though, I wish this game had more to it. Thanks

I knew it was going to be good but I had a thought at the back of my head that it was only going to be good for nostalgia fuel and for those born in the atari era. But that wasn't the case. I enjoyed it and my first console was the gameboy. This is a great game. I think everyone qould enjoys it it reminds me of banjo kazooie on the gameboy. Couldn't have asked for a better retro game.

The only thing that could have made it better would be if they implemented mixed reality into the next game.

Apart from that, the controls were a bit difficult but that might have been my stick drift. And the fade to white was a bit blinding but could easily be solved by closing your eyes. 

Great game though would recommend.
I want a refund it wasn’t what I expected I finished the whole game and now what the game will just sit on my oculus waiting to be played again but it never will waste of my time and my money
This game is so adventurous and addictive this game is just wow best purchase I’ve ever made !!! You go back in the present to play games a hard game but still very fun story!!!! 10/10

Clever game but i deleted it from my library because i HATE platforming. Trying to get through the level with Mom on the phone was making me crazy. Im sure for the right person this game is wonderful.
The aspect of switching between the game world and the human world is as fun as it sounds, it reminds me of when I was a kid, trying not to get caught on the game 😭
Really fun mix of pixel art and 3d styles. Unique mechanics that fit really really well. I'd recommend you play this one.

I really love this game, you can tell the developers made it with love and nostalgia!

Really fun game! I kind of wish there was more real world interaction and less glued to the TV screen playing mini games. I kinda liked the mum too 😉

The best game ever in my opinion and the best levels and i love the game but the level where the mom plays her hands come off really easily but other than that and im on the level where the mom plays other than that its the best game ever
Retro dream. Works wonderful and is a trip back in time well appreciate it.
It is fun because the first part and the boss fight and also the fact that you can switch a different games what they say avatar and use power ups from different games ￼
I like all the levels except for one and two ￼
Really enjoy the game. Finished the game on horizon+  and feels like want to buy the bundle set just to play the 80s part. Such a fun and immersive game
Very fun! Great graphics! Love how you are play as a person playing a video game on a tv or arcade, it really adds to the immersion. Funny game too!
Couldn’t put the headset down
Very immersive, love the art styles. If you like retro games and a challenge, this is the game for you.
Great pixel? Game? ;)
This game really threw me into my own 9 year old shoes. Playing games on the living room floor. I need a pt 2
I love the story and overall gameplay and if you look at the pictures and think it’s just a flatscreen game in vr you are so wrong.
Couldn't get into it myself was slow boring and way to hard on the eyes.

developer_response.body:
If you have any constructive criticism for us that could help us create better game that meet the standards of all of our customers we would really appreciate it. 

It'd be good to have a structured review to help us bring a good game to the community.

Hope we can hear from you.

reviews.review_description: To buggy
Watching this was so cool and now playing it I can see why it got hype, the graphics were amazing for a quest 2 game (for me)
More, please.  Yeah, that was fun.
Game reminds you of growing up in the 80$ with all those fun games
Super repetitive but it was fun and a cool concept
Fun, immersive and a decent challenge in some areas. Replayability with unlockable skins as well.
I love it soo much but is so hard but I like it

This game has some cool moments, but unfortunately, the games that you play (which are clearly clones from famous games from the early videogame era) are very simple and not very good. Some small parts have neat mechanics, and if you just want to feel some nostalgia, then maybe it could be something that you may like.
Heheh
Amazing game play, top tier storyline, took me back to being a gamer in the 90's. Best all around VR game I've played so far!
i love the game 💖
I got and played the game through horizon+, it's pretty fun. I just wish I could flip the mother off, and punt the kid that harasses you all game across a field.
Amazing graphics going through different types of games. I love the story and the whole concept. Wonderful game!
Very fun game
Feels like your a kid in the 90s playing your new game console. Feels nostalgic
Had a really good time! Very nostalgic.
This is my new favorite VR game
Love the game progression, a lot of fun.

reviews.review_title: Soo good u need to get it
reviews.review_description: So this game is sooooo good and the story too but it needs an easy mode but still good and the dlc is good too thanks for reading

Dude, this game is so fun you play as a kid and live the childhood of a kid in the 1990’s, the end parade is so fun

Sincerely, Kaleb
